name: Pumpkin Cheesecake Squares
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350°F. Prepare an 8-inch square pan with cooking spray and flour; set aside.
To prepare crust and topping, combine flour and brown sugar. Cut in margarine to make crumb mixture. Stir in walnuts. Set aside 3/4 cup of the mixture for topping. Press remaining mixture into bottom of prepared pan. Bake for 15 minutes.
Meanwhile, to prepare filling, combine cream cheese, granulated sugar, pumpkin, egg whites, cinnamon, vanilla, and allspice; blend until smooth. Pour over baked crust. Sprinkle with reserved topping. Bake for another 40 minutes or until slightly firm.
